samples.xml_description:
<module id="serial2parallel">
    <description>Implement a series-parallel conversion circuit. It receives a serial input signal "din_serial" along with a control signal "din_valid" indicating the validity of the input data. The module operates on the rising edge of the clock signal "clk" and uses a synchronous design. The input din_serial is a single-bit data, and when the module receives 8 input data, the output dout_parallel outputs the 8-bit data(The serial input values are sequentially placed in dout_parallel from the most significant bit to the least significant bit), and the dout_valid is set to 1.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="din_serial">Serial input data.</input>
        <input id="din_valid">Validity signal for input data.</input>
        <output id="dout_parallel" width_description="[7:0]">Parallel output data.</output>
        <output id="dout_valid">Validity signal for the output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="ADD=6'b100000">ADD</parameter>
        <parameter id="SUB=6'b100010">SUB</parameter>
        <parameter id="MULT=6'b011000">MULT</parameter>
        <parameter id="LSH=6'b000000">LSH</parameter>
        <parameter id="RSH=6'b000010">RSH</parameter>
        <parameter id="GT=6'b100101">GT</parameter>
        <parameter id="LT=6'b100100">LT</parameter>
        <parameter id="EQ=6'b100111">EQ</parameter>
        <parameter id="NEQ=6'b100110">NEQ</parameter>
        <parameter id="AND=6'b100100">AND</parameter>
        <parameter id="OR=6'b100111">OR</parameter>
        <parameter id="XOR=6'b100110">XOR</parameter>
        <parameter id="NAND=6'b011001">NAND</parameter>
        <parameter id="NOR=6'b011100">NOR</parameter>
        <parameter id="XNOR=6'b011101">XNOR</parameter>
        <parameter id="TRUE=1'b1">TRUE</parameter>
        <parameter id="FALSE=1'b0">FALSE</parameter>
        <parameter id="LOW=1'b0">LOW</parameter>
        <parameter id="HIGH=1'b1">HIGH</parameter>
        <parameter id="H=1'b1">H</parameter>
        <parameter id="L=1'b0">L</parameter>
        <parameter id="RST=1'b0">RST</parameter>
        <parameter id="DIN=1'b1">DIN</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic>
            <description>Sequential logic for the module.</description>
            <reg id="" description="Counter for the module.">Counter for the module.</reg>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <description>Reset the counter when the reset signal is low.</description>
        <if>
            <condition>
                <and>
                    <id>rst_n</id>
                    <not>
                        <id>rst_n</id>
                    </not>
                </and>
            </condition>
            <then>
                <non_blocking>
                    <id>cnt</id>
                    <assign>
                        <value>0</value>
                    </assign>
                </non_blocking>
            </then>
        </if>
        <description>When the input data is valid, start counting.</description>
        <if>
            <condition>
                <and>
                    <id>clk</id>
                    <id>din_valid</id>
                </and>
            </condition>
            <then>
                <non_blocking>
                    <id>cnt</id>
                    <assign>
                        <value>
                            <add>
                                <id>cnt</id>
                                <value>1</value>
                            </add>
                        </value>
                    </assign>
                </non_blocking>
            </then>
        </if>
        <description>When the counter reaches 7, the input data is valid.</description>
        <if>
            <condition>
                <and>
                    <id>clk</id>
                    <id>din_valid</id>
                    <equal>
                        <id>cnt</id>
                        <value>7</value>
                    </equal>
                </and>
            </condition>
            <then>
                <non_blocking>
                    <id>dout_valid</id>
                    <assign>
                        <value>
                            <id>TRUE</id>
                        </value>
                    </assign>
                </non_blocking>
            </then>
        </if>
        <description>When the counter does not reach 7, the input data is not valid.</description>
        <if>
            <condition>
                <and>
                    <id>clk</id>
                    <id>din_valid</id>
                    <not>
                        <equal>
                            <id>cnt</id>
                            <value>7</value>
                        </equal>
                    </not>
                </and>
            </condition>
            <then>
                <non_blocking>
                    <id>dout_valid</id>
                    <assign>
                        <value>
                            <id>FALSE</id>
                        </value>
                    </assign>
                </non_blocking>
            </then>
        </if>
        <description>When the counter reaches 7, the input data is valid.</description>
        <if>
            <condition>
                <and>
                    <id>clk</id>
                    <id>din_valid</id>
                    <equal>
                        <id>cnt</id>
                        <value>7</value>
                    </equal>
                </and>
            </condition>
            <then>
                <non_blocking>
                    <id>dout_parallel</id>
                    <assign>
                        <value>
                            <concat>
                                <id>din_serial</id>
                                <id>dout_parallel[7:1]</id>
                            </concat>
                        </value>
                    </assign>
                </non_blocking>
            </then>
        </if>
    </implementation>
</module>
